overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting exploration of the ancient Greek village Myrrine. The player character walks through a market square with a golden statue, ascends stone pathways through autumn-colored residential areas with coastal views, and approaches a sanctuary gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek market square with wooden colonnade

events.description: passing the golden statue on the right side
exiting the covered market area into open village path

agents.ego_description: walking through the market square past the golden statue and wooden stalls

entered.detail: tall golden statue of a robed figure on a white stone pedestal with red trim
wooden market structure with columns and roof covering
wooden stall with hanging fabric banner featuring red patterns
whitewashed stone houses with tiled roofs built into the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit ancient Greek market square dominated by a golden statue on a pedestal. The camera moves past wooden market stalls with hanging banners and colonnades, transitioning from a semi-covered area to an open village path with stone buildings visible on the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: village residential street with stone houses

events.description: passing a black horse standing near a stone house wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the village dirt path past stone houses and autumn trees

notable_agents.action: black horse standing still near the stone house wall

entered.detail: two-story stone house with wooden balcony and shuttered windows
wooden wagon with sacks parked beside the path
trees with bright yellow and orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: Moving through the lower village residential area, the path winds past stone houses with wooden balconies. A black horse stands near one house while wooden carts and autumn-colored trees line the dirt trail leading toward stairs in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending through residential area with coastal vista

events.description: coastal view and sea become visible to the left
sun becomes visible creating strong backlight through the trees

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through the upper village with expansive view of the sea and coastline

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending through the village
distant view of the sea and coastline visible between buildings
rustic wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long flight of stone stairs through the upper village, revealing a stunning coastal vista with the sea visible to the left. Sunlight streams through the autumn trees creating a warm backlit atmosphere as the path continues upward past wooden fences and stone houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to sanctuary gate with wooden fortifications

events.description: two villagers appear walking down the stairs toward the camera
approaching the large wooden sanctuary gate at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing final stone steps toward the sanctuary gate, passing villagers descending the stairs

notable_agents.action: two villagers in ancient Greek attire walking down the stairs

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with red columns and stone stairs leading up to it
stone arch bridge visible in the valley below
tall wooden fence surrounding the sanctuary area

segments.scene_description: The final ascent approaches the sanctuary gate, with stone stairs leading up to a large wooden structure with red columns. Two villagers walk down toward the camera while wooden palisades and a stone arch bridge appear in the background. The location text reveals this is the 'Desecrated Sanctuary' as the player reaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling sunlit market square up through a hillside village toward a secluded sanctuary. It begins by gliding past wooden stalls and colonnades beneath a towering golden statue, transitioning from the covered market into an open village path. As the camera winds through the lower residential area, the scene shifts past stone houses and autumn-colored trees before ascending a long flight of stone stairs that reveal a sweeping coastal vista. The path continues upward through a warm, backlit atmosphere of golden foliage and wooden fences, finally approaching a large wooden structure with red columns. The movement concludes at the entrance of the Desecrated Sanctuary, passing villagers on the stairs as a stone arch bridge appears in the background.
